variants: Meline Torosyan, a resident of Beaconroot Plains, has made remarkable strides in the field of animal physiology. Her influential work, Opaline Synthesis Key, showcases her expertise and innovative thinking. For her significant contributions to the discipline, Meline was bestowed with the Nebula Ember Trophy. Additionally, she is actively involved with the Aether Lantern Restorers, a group dedicated to the preservation and understanding of historical relics and their connection to the animal world. Her dedication to both research and community makes her a respected figure in her field.
